name: Gilroy Gardens Family Theme Park
description: Gilroy Gardens Family Theme Park, often shortened to Gilroy Gardens, is a horticulture-themed amusement park located in Gilroy, California, United States.  Designed and built by Michael Bonfante, the park originally opened as Bonfante Gardens in 2001.  The 536 acre is owned by the city of Gilroy and operated by Gilroy Gardens, Inc.
